official_name: Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program
notes: FedRAMP publishes informative guidance documents alongside its control baselines: playbooks, templates, white papers, training material, and program-administration documents. These guidance docs are not control catalogs themselves; the control content lives in the FedRAMP baselines (registered under control/gov/fedramp).

match_nodes.description: FedRAMP 3PAO (Third Party Assessment Organization) guidance documents

data.description: Documents describing 3PAO obligations, performance standards, and readiness-assessment reporting requirements.

match_nodes.description: FedRAMP playbook documents (agency or CSP workflow guidance)

data.description: Procedural playbooks for FedRAMP stakeholders walking through authorization, continuous monitoring, and related workflows.
Fillable forms and Word templates that CSPs and agencies use during the FedRAMP process (SSP, SAP, SAR, POA&M, RoB, etc.).
Guidance documents addressed to Cloud Service Providers covering operations, monitoring, scanning, and reporting.
FedRAMP-prefixed program documents including branding guidance, policy memos, white papers, and quick guides.

SSP appendix templates such as Rules of Behavior (Appendix F), Information System Contingency Plan (Appendix G), Cryptographic Modules Table (Appendix Q). Appendix A (Security Controls) is a control catalog and lives under control/gov/fedramp.
Specific FedRAMP guidance documents that don't fit the broader CSP-/playbook-/template- naming patterns.
